verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holiness, holiness is what I Long for Holiness is what I need Holiness, holiness is what You want from me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So take my heart and form it Take my mind, transform it Take my will, conform it To Yours, to Yours, Oh Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Faithfulness, faithfulness is what I Long for Faithfulness is what I need Faithfulness, faithfulness is what You want from me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Righteousness, righteousness is what I Long for Righteousness is what I need Righteousness, righteousness is what You want from me
